desc: Places views onto the currently active sheet.
summary: Places views onto the currently active sheet. Shows a list of recently modified/created views that can be placed. User must be on a ViewSheet when running this command. Uses PlaceViewsInSheet helper for viewport placement and layout.
usecase: User wants to populate a sheet with floor plans, sections, or details after creating them.
notfor: Creating new views (use CreateSectionFromGridlineCommand etc.). Creating sheets (use CreateSheetCommand).
precondition: Active view must be a ViewSheet. At least one unplaced view must exist.
postcondition: Selected views are placed as viewports on the active sheet.

config_inputs.name: layout
config_inputs.description: Layout strategy: single, row, or grid

outputs.name: SheetNumber
outputs.description: Sheet number views were placed on

preprompts: Placing views onto the active sheet...
Adding selected views to the sheet...
thinkingsteps: Checking active view is a sheet...
successprompts: Done — views are now on the sheet.
